Bit00.Description: Clutch - Used to clutch the roll tester motors to the rollers. 1 - clutch, 0 - don't clutch.

Bit01.Description: Declutch - Used to disable the roller clutches. 1 - disengage clutch, 0 - don't disengage clutch.

Bit02.Description: ZerospeedToPLC - This bit is set when the machine is detected to be at zerospeed. 1 - Zerospeed, 0 - Rolling

Bit03.Description: Overspeed - This is written when the machine exceeds the speed that was set in the Overspeed parameter. 1 - Overspeed, 0 - Normal

Bit04.Description: Boost - This is written to allow the rollers to be driven by the system. 1 - boost, 0 - disengage boost.

Bit06.Description: Operate Stamp

Bit07.Description: ABSTestSelectedLamp - Enable the ABS test selected lamp (machines with marque lights). 1 - enable, 0 - disable

Bit08.Description: ArmLamp - Enable the arm ABS test lamp (machines with marque lights). 1 - enable, 0 - disable

Bit09.Description: NeutralLamp - Enable the neutral test lamp (machines with marque lights). 1 - enable, 0 - disable

Bit10.Description: BrakeLamp - Enable the brake test lamp (machines with marque lights). 1 - enable, 0 - disable

Bit11.Description: AcceptLamp - Enable the accept/pass lamp (machines with marque lights). 1 - enable, 0 - disable

Bit12.Description: FaultLamp - Enable the vehicle test fault lamp (machines with marque lights). 1 - enable, 0 - disable

Bit13.Description: DriversFaultSignal - Illuminate a light that indicates driver fault. 1 - Driver Fault, 0 - No Driver Fault

Bit14.Description: Start4WDTestSignalToPLC - This prevents the front wheels to being driven by the rear during a 4x4 test. 1 - enable 4WD test, 0 - disable 4WD test.

Bit15.Description: RetestSignal - Signal a retest to the PLC (not sure what in the heck it does).

Bit00.Description: LFDragRejectLamp - Illuminate the left front drag force too high lamp. 1 - enable, 0 - disable

Bit01.Description: RFDragRejectLamp - Illuminate the right front drag force too high lamp. 1 - enable, 0 - disable

Bit02.Description: LRDragRejectLamp - Illuminate the left rear drag force too high lamp. 1 - enable, 0 - disable

Bit03.Description: RRDragRejectLamp - Illuminate the right rear drag force too high lamp. 1 - enable, 0 - disable

Bit04.Description: LFBrakeRejectLamp - Illuminate the left front brake force fail lamp. 1 - enable, 0 - disable

Bit05.Description: RFBrakeRejectLamp - Illuminate the right front brake force fail lamp. 1 - enable, 0 - disable

Bit06.Description: LRBrakeRejectLamp - Illuminate the right front brake force fail lamp. 1 - enable, 0 - disable

Bit07.Description: RRBrakeRejectLamp - Illuminate the right rear brake force fail lamp. 1 - enable, 0 - disable

Bit08.Description: FrontBalanceRejectLamp - Illuminate the front brake balance fail lamp. 1 - enable, 0 - disable

Bit09.Description: RearBalanceRejectLamp - Illuminate the rear brake balance fail lamp. 1 - enable, 0 - disable

Bit10.Description: FrontToRearBalanceRejectLamp - Iluminate the front to rear brake balance fail lamp. 1 - enable, 0 - disable

Bit11.Description: AntiLockRejectLamp - Iluminate the anti-lock brake fail lamp. 1 - enable, 0 - disable

Bit12.Description: PositractionRejectLamp - Iluminate the positraction fail lamp. 1 - enable, 0 - disable

Bit13.Description: AxleRatioRejectLamp - Iluminate the axle ratio fail lamp. 1 - enable, 0 - disable

Bit14.Description: ParkingBrakeRejectLamp - Iluminate the parking brake test fail lamp. 1 - enable, 0 - disable

Bit15.Description: EnableDifferentialLockTestBrake - Turn on the DC holding brake for the differential lock test (tandem axle)

Bit00.Description: WheelbasePosition01 - Command the wheelbase to move to wheel base position 1. 1 - move to position WB position 2, 0 - don't move

Bit01.Description: WheelbasePosition02 - Command the wheelbase to move to wheel base position 2. 1 - move to position WB position 3, 0 - don't move

Bit02.Description: WheelbasePosition03 - Command the wheelbase to move to wheel base position 3. 1 - move to position WB position 4, 0 - don't move

Bit03.Description: WheelbasePosition04 - Command the wheelbase to move to wheel base position 4. 1 - move to position WB position 5, 0 - don't move

Bit04.Description: WheelbasePosition05 - Command the wheelbase to move to wheel base position 5. 1 - move to position WB position 6, 0 - don't move

Bit05.Description: RWD Selected - Tell the PLC that the current vehicle under test is a rear wheel drive vehicle. 1- rear wheel drive, 0 - not rear wheel drive.

Bit06.Description: 4WDSelected - Tell the PLC that the current vehicle under test is a four wheel drive vehicle. 1- four wheel drive, 0 - not four wheel drive

Bit07.Description: ParkingBrakeTest - Perform the parking brake test (Hydraulic Machines). 1 - perform test, 0 - idle

Bit08.Description: WheelbasePosition07 - Command the wheelbase to move to wheel base position 7. 1 - move to position WB position 8, 0 - don't move

Bit09.Description: WheelbasePosition08 - Command the wheelbase to move to wheel base position 8. 1 - move to position WB position 9, 0 - don't move

Bit10.Description: WheelbasePosition09 - Command the wheelbase to move to wheel base position 9. 1 - move to position WB position 10, 0 - don't move

Bit11.Description: WheelbasePosition10 - Command the wheelbase to move to wheel base position 10. 1 - move to position WB position 11, 0 - don't move

Bit12.Description: WheelbasePosition11 - Command the wheelbase to move to wheel base position 11. 1 - move to position WB position 12, 0 - don't move

Bit13.Description: WheelbasePosition12 - Command the wheelbase to move to wheel base position 12. 1 - move to position WB position 12, 0 - don't move

Bit14.Description: FWDSelected - Front wheel drive vehicle selected

Bit15.Description: WheelbasePosition06 - Command the wheelbase to move to wheel base position 6. 1 - move to position WB position 7, 0 - don't move

Bit00.Description: StartLamp - Iluminate the start vehicle test lamp. 1 - enable, 0 - disable

Bit01.Description: RollTestLamp - Iluminate the roll test lamp. 1 - enable, 0 - disable

Bit02.Description: BrakeTestLamp - Iluminate the brake test lamp. 1 - enable, 0 - disable

Bit03.Description: CompleteLamp - Iluminate the vehicle test complete lamp. 1 - enable, 0 - disable

Bit04.Description: AccelLamp - Iluminate the accelerate to speed lamp. 1 - enable, 0 - disable

Bit05.Description: 40KPHLamp - Iluminate the accelerate to 40 KPH lamp. 1 - enable, 0 - disable

Bit06.Description: TractionControlLamp - Iluminate the testing traction control lamp. 1 - enable, 0 - disable

Bit07.Description: ECULamp - Iluminate the testing the engine controller lamp. 1 - enable, 0 - disable

Bit08.Description: HornSignal - Turn on the horn to signal something. 1 - Horn On, 0 - Horn Off

Bit11.Description: SimulateSwitchOn - This indicates if the simulation switch is on. 1- On, 0 - Off

Bit12.Description: StartReverseTest - Signal the PLC that the reverse test is being performed. 1 - Testing, 0 - Not Testing

Bit13.Description: ABSCableConnected - Signal to the PLC that ABS cable is connected (this is to prevent the retainers to lowering so the driver does not rip the cable off). 1 - Connected, 0 - Disconnected

Bit14.Description: StartJounceTest - Start the jounce test (for 2400 machines to bounce vehicle with elevators to settle the suspension prior to alignment). 1 - Jounce, 0 - Off

Bit00.Description: FrontWheelDriveSelected - Indicate the vehicle is a front wheel drive vehicle. 1 - FWD, 0 - Not

Bit01.Description: AllWheelDriveSelected - Indicate the vehicle is a front wheel drive vehicle. 1 - AWD, 0 - Not

Bit02.Description: ABSTestSelected - Indicate that the ABS test was selected. 1 - Testing ABS, 0 - Not Testing ABS

Bit03.Description: ManualTransmission - Vehicle is equipped with a manual transmission. 1 - Manual, 0 - Not Manual

Bit05.Description: EATX - Vehicle is equipped with an EATX transmission. 1 - EATXl, 0 - Not EATX

Bit06.Description: CruiseControlSelected - Vehicle equipped with cruise control. 1 - Equipped, 0 - Not Equipped

Bit07.Description: TiltTestSelected - Vehicle equipped with tilt steering. 1 - Equipped, 0 - Not Equipped

Bit08.Description: Test90PercentComplete - Indicate that the test is 90% complete. 1 - 90% Complete, 0 - Not 90% Complete

Bit09.Description: DaytimeRunningLightsSelectedToPLC - Vehicle equipped with day time running lights. 1 - Equipped, 0 - Not Equipped

Bit10.Description: EBSDriveSpeed - Indicate the speed to run the EBS drive at. 1 - Low Speed, 0 - High Speed

Bit11.Description: ApplyRollBrakes - Instruct the PLC to apply the roll brakes. 1 - Apply Brakes, 0 - Don't Apply Brakes

Bit12.Description: DeclutchFrontAndRearHydraulicClutches - Declutch the front and rear hydraulic clutches. 1 - Declutch Hydraulic Clutch, 0 - Don't Declutch

Bit13.Description: DeclutchFrontRollClutch - Declutch only the front roller clutch. 1 - Declutch Front Roller Clutch, 0 - Don't Declutch Front Roller Clutch

Bit14.Description: DeclutchRearRollClutch - Declutch only the rear roller clutch. 1 - Declutch Rear Roller Clutch, 0 - Don't Declutch Rear Roller Clutch

Bit15.Description: VMESystemReady - Indicate to the PLC that the VME system is up and running. 1 - VME Running, 0 - VME Not Running.

Bit00.Description: UpperNeg12VoltPowerSupplyTolerance - Indicate that the upper -12 volt power supply is out of tolerance. 1 - Out Of tolerance, 0 - Not Out Of tolerance

Bit01.Description: UpperPos12VoltPowerSupplyTolerance - Indicate that the upper 12 volt power supply is out of tolerance. 1 - Out Of tolerance, 0 - Not Out Of tolerance

Bit02.Description: UpperPos5VoltPowerSupplyTolerance - Indicate that the upper 5 volt power supply is out of tolerance. 1 - Out Of tolerance, 0 - Not Out Of tolerance

Bit03.Description: LowerPos5VoltPowerSupplyTolerance - Indicate that the lower 5 volt power supply is out of tolerance. 1 - Out Of tolerance, 0 - Not Out Of tolerance

Bit04.Description: LowerPos12VoltPowerSupplyTolerance - Indicate that the lower 12 volt power supply is out of tolerance. 1 - Out Of tolerance, 0 - Not Out Of tolerance

Bit05.Description: LowerNeg12VoltPowerSupplyTolerance - Indicate that the lower -12 volt power supply is out of tolerance. 1 - Out Of tolerance, 0 - Not Out Of tolerance

Bit06.Description: WheelbasePos24VoltPowerSupplyTolerance - Indicate that the 24 volt wheelbase power supply is out of tolerance. 1 - Out Of tolerance, 0 - Not Out Of tolerance

Bit07.Description: PowerSenseLostToIORack - Signal the PLC that the power sense was lost to the I/O rack. 1 - Power Sense Lost, 0 - Power Sense Detected

Bit08.Description: BoostPressureFailure - Detected a failure in the boosting of the rollers. 1 - Failure, 0 - No Trouble Detected

Bit09.Description: UnitControllerCommFault - Unit controller communication fault detected. 1 - Fault, 0 - No Trouble Detected

Bit10.Description: SSSTesterCommFault - SSS tester communication fault detected. 1 - Fault, 0 - No Trouble Detected

Bit11.Description: ScannerCommFault - Scanner communication fault detected. 1 - Communication Fault, 0 - No Fault

Bit12.Description: KeypadCommFault - Keypad communication fault detected. 1 - Fault, 0 - No Fault

Bit13.Description: PLCDidNotInitialize - Indicate that the handshake between the VME and PLC has not happened. 1 - PLC Not Initialized, 0 - PLC Initialized

Bit14.Description: WattTransducerFault - Indicate a fault with the watt transducer. 1 - Fault Detected, 0 - No Fault Detected

Bit15.Description: SystemControllerTaskFault - Indicate that there was a fault in the Real Time System. 1 - Fault Detected, 0 - No Fault Detected

Bit00.Description: FRollSpeedsNotEqualWhenClutched - Indicate that the front roller speeds were not equal even though they are clutched (usually indicates a physical problem on the machine). 1 - Fault Detected, 0 - No Fault

Bit01.Description: RRollSpeedsNotEqualWhenClutched - Indicate that the rear roller speeds were not equal even though they are clutched (usually indicates a physical problem on the machine). 1 - Fault Detected, 0 - No Fault

Bit02.Description: LFMachLossChangeOver5LBS - Indicate that there was a left front roller and hardware has an unusually high drag change since the previous Loss Compenation. 1 - Fault Detected, 0 - No Fault Detected

Bit03.Description: RFMachLossChangeOver5LBS - Indicate that there was a right front roller and hardware has an unusually high drag change since the previous Loss Compenation. 1 - Fault Detected, 0 - No Fault Detected

Bit04.Description: LRMachLossChangeOver5LBS - Indicate that there was a left rear roller and hardware has an unusually high drag change since the previous Loss Compenation. 1 - Fault Detected, 0 - No Fault Detected

Bit05.Description: RRMachLossChangeOver5LBS - Indicate that there was a right rear roller and hardware has an unusually high drag change since the previous Loss Compenation. 1 - Fault Detected, 0 - No Fault Detected

Bit06.Description: LFMachLossOutOfLimits - The left front machine loss has exceeded the maximum allowed value (value set by parameter). 1 - Fault Detected, 0 - No Fault Detected

Bit07.Description: RFMachLossOutOfLimits - The right front machine loss has exceeded the maximum allowed value (value set by parameter). 1 - Fault Detected, 0 - No Fault Detected

Bit08.Description: LRMachLossOutOfLimits - The left rear machine loss has exceeded the maximum allowed value (value set by parameter). 1 - Fault Detected, 0 - No Fault Detected

Bit09.Description: RRMachLossOutOfLimits - The right reart machine loss has exceeded the maximum allowed value (value set by parameter). 1 - Fault Detected, 0 - No Fault Detected

Bit10.Description: LFEncoderRunoutError - The left front encoder runout error was detected. (value set by parameter). 1 - Fault Detected, 0 - No Fault Detected

Bit11.Description: RFEncoderRunoutError - The right front encoder runout error was detected. (value set by parameter). 1 - Fault Detected, 0 - No Fault Detected

Bit12.Description: LREncoderRunoutError - The left rear encoder runout error was detected. (value set by parameter). 1 - Fault Detected, 0 - No Fault Detected

Bit13.Description: RREncoderRunoutError - The right rear encoder runout error was detected. (value set by parameter). 1 - Fault Detected, 0 - No Fault Detected

Bit14.Description: CycleLimitExceeded - The number of tests that have been performed before a machine Loss Compenation has been exceeded. 1 - Max Tests Exceeded, 0 - Max Tests Not Exceeded

Bit15.Description: CycleLimitWarning - Warning that the number of tests that have been performed before a machine Loss Compenation will be exceeded in X number of tests (X is set by the user). 1 - Max Tests Warning, 0 - No Warning

Bit00.Description: StartRearEBSDrives - Start the rear wheel EBS drives. 1- Start Drive, 0 - Disable Drive

Bit01.Description: KeyboardTripSwitchControl - Enable the Keyboard Trip Switch (This is the switch that is driven over by the vehicle to raise the retainers). 1 - Enable, 0 - Disable

Bit02.Description: FrontRollsHydraulicAssist4WD - Enable the hydraulic assist during a four wheel drive test (Used for AWD vehicles that do not drive the front wheels well). 1 - Enable Assist, 0 - Disable Assist

Bit03.Description: StartParkingPawlTest - Start the PLC parking pawl test (hydraulic machine). 1 - Start, 0 - Done

Bit04.Description: FatalFaultFlasher - Flash the fatal fault beacon. 1 - Flash, 0 - Off

Bit05.Description: SensorCrossAndTracLock - Engage the left side brakes on the machine to perform a sensor cross and track lock test (hydraulic machines). 1 - Engage, 0 - Disengage

Bit06.Description: ReleaseLRBrake - Release the left rear brake (used in conjunction with SensorCrossAndTrac-Lock). 1 - Release, 0 - Not Released

Bit07.Description: ReleaseLFBrake - Release the left front brake (used in conjunction with SensorCrossAndTrac-Lock). 1 - Release, 0 - Not Released

Bit09.Description: InterrollPressureOff - Turn the inter roll pressure off for cruise testing. 1 - Turn Pressure Off, 0 - Turn Pressue On

Bit10.Description: FlywheelClutch - Engage the flywheel clutch. 1 - Engaged, 0 - Not Engaged

Bit11.Description: FlywheelDeclutch - Disengage the flywheel clutch. 1 - Disengage, 0 - Not Disengaged

Bit12.Description: TractionControlTestOn - Engage the traction control test. 1 - Engaged, 0 - Not Engaged

Bit13.Description: StartDCLTest - Start the DCL test. 1 - Running, 0 - Not Running

Bit14.Description: RaiseRolls-LowerElevators - Raise the retaining rolls (360/3600) or lower the eleveators (2400). 1 - Retain Vehicle, 0 - Don't Retain Vehicle

Bit15.Description: ValidBarcodeScan - A valid barcode scan was received. 1 - Valid Scan, 0 - No Scan

Bit00.Description: CCDTranslatorNotResponding - The CCD bus translator is not responding. 1 - Fault, 0 - No Fault

Bit01.Description: CCDTranslatorNotAcceptingCommands - The CCD bus translator is not accepting commands. 1 - Fault, 0 - No Fault

Bit02.Description: BadMessageFromCCDTranslator - A bad message to the CCD Translator was received. 1 - Fault, 0 - No Fault

Bit03.Description: PLCSerialReadFault - A fault was detected while performing a serial read to the PLC. 1 - Fault, 0 - No Fault

Bit04.Description: PLCSerialWriteFault - A fault was detected while performing a serial write to the PLC. 1 - Fault, 0 - No Fault

Bit05.Description: LHPendantFault - A fault was detected while setting up the left hand pendant. 1 - Fault, 0 - No Fault

Bit06.Description: RHPendantFault - A fault was detected while setting up the right hand pendant. 1 - Fault, 0 - No Fault

Bit12.Description: LFRollMotorDriveCommFault - There was a fault communicating with the left front roll motor drive.

Bit13.Description: RFRollMotorDriveCommFault - There was a fault communicating with the right front roll motor drive.

Bit14.Description: LRRollMotorDriveCommFault - There was a fault communicating with the left rear roll motor drive.

Bit15.Description: RRRollMotorDriveCommFault - There was a fault communicating with the right rear roll motor drive.

Bit00.Description: ProgramWheelbasePosition - This bit is written for 1 second to indicate to the PLC to store the current location of the wheelbase transducer in the indicated wheelbase position. 1 - Program, 0 - Don't Program

Bit01.Description: EnableAllRollDrives - Enable all roll drives (3600 machine). 1 - Enable, 0 - Disable

Bit02.Description: DCLControl - Don't Know? (JAG Machine)

Bit03.Description: MotorControllerTaskHeartbeat - The heartbeat that toggles to indicate that the motor task is active.

Bit04.Description: WattTransducerControl - Don't Know?

Bit05.Description: AirbagTestFailed - The airbag test failed flag. 1 - Test Failed, 0 - Test Not Failed

Bit06.Description: AirbagTestInProgress - The airbag test is in progress. 1 - Testing, 0 - Not Testing

Bit07.Description: AirbagTestPassed - The airbag test passed flag. 1 - Test Passed, 0 - Test Not Passed

Bit08.Description: SpeedProTest - Raise the front elevators for the speed proportional steering test (2400 machines). 1 - Raise, 0 - Don't Raise

Bit09.Description: CheckWheelbasePositionAgain - Signal the PLC to check the wheelbase position again. 1 - Check, 0 - Don't Check

Bit10.Description: DeployVibrationSensor - Open the laser door to perform vibration testing. 1 - Open Door, 0 - Close Door

Bit11.Description: RighthandDriveSelectedToPLC - Select the right hand drive controls for testing the vehilcle. 1 - Selected, 0 - Not Selected

Bit12.Description: TurnOnAuxillaryOutputOne - DVT commanded to turn on the auxillary output number on. 1 - Enable, 0 - Disable

Bit13.Description: TurnOnAuxillaryOutputTwo - DVT commanded to turn on the auxillary output number two. 1 - Enable, 0 - Disable

Bit14.Description: ResetPLC - Reset the PLC. 1 - Reset, 0 - Don't Reset

Bit15.Description: UniDirectionalPark-PawlTest - Select the uni-directional park/pawl test (opposed to performing the test in both directions). 1 - Uni-Direction, 0 - BiDirection

Bit00.Description: LFWheelSpeed Bit 00

Bit01.Description: LFWheelSpeed Bit 01

Bit02.Description: LFWheelSpeed Bit 02

Bit03.Description: LFWheelSpeed Bit 03

Bit04.Description: LFWheelSpeed Bit 04

Bit05.Description: LFWheelSpeed Bit 05

Bit06.Description: LFWheelSpeed Bit 06

Bit07.Description: LFWheelSpeed Bit 07

Bit08.Description: LFWheelSpeed Bit 08

Bit13.Description: LFWheelSpeed Bit 13

Bit00.Description: LRWheelSpeed Bit 00

Bit01.Description: LRWheelSpeed Bit 01

Bit02.Description: LRWheelSpeed Bit 02

Bit03.Description: LRWheelSpeed Bit 03

Bit04.Description: LRWheelSpeed Bit 04

Bit05.Description: LRWheelSpeed Bit 05

Bit06.Description: LRWheelSpeed Bit 06

Bit07.Description: LRWheelSpeed Bit 07

Bit08.Description: LRWheelSpeed Bit 08

Bit13.Description: LRWheelSpeed Bit 13

Bit00.Description: CalibratePressure Bit 00

Bit01.Description: CalibratePressure Bit 01

Bit02.Description: CalibratePressure Bit 02

Bit03.Description: CalibratePressure Bit 03

Bit04.Description: CalibratePressure Bit 04

Bit05.Description: CalibratePressure Bit 05

Bit06.Description: CalibratePressure Bit 06

Bit07.Description: CalibratePressure Bit 07

Bit08.Description: CalibratePressure Bit 08

Bit13.Description: CalibratePressure Bit 13

Bit00.Description: BoostPressure Bit 00

Bit01.Description: BoostPressure Bit 01

Bit02.Description: BoostPressure Bit 02

Bit03.Description: BoostPressure Bit 03

Bit04.Description: BoostPressure Bit 04

Bit05.Description: BoostPressure Bit 05

Bit06.Description: BoostPressure Bit 06

Bit07.Description: BoostPressure Bit 07

Bit08.Description: BoostPressure Bit 08

Bit13.Description: BoostPressure Bit 13

Bit00.Description: MinBoostPressure Bit 00

Bit01.Description: MinBoostPressure Bit 01

Bit02.Description: MinBoostPressure Bit 02

Bit03.Description: MinBoostPressure Bit 03

Bit04.Description: MinBoostPressure Bit 04

Bit05.Description: MinBoostPressure Bit 05

Bit06.Description: MinBoostPressure Bit 06

Bit07.Description: MinBoostPressure Bit 07

Bit08.Description: MinBoostPressure Bit 08

Bit13.Description: MinBoostPressure Bit 13

Bit00.Description: JounceCycles Bit 00

Bit01.Description: JounceCycles Bit 01

Bit02.Description: JounceCycles Bit 02

Bit03.Description: JounceCycles Bit 03

Bit04.Description: JounceCycles Bit 04

Bit05.Description: JounceCycles Bit 05

Bit06.Description: JounceCycles Bit 06

Bit07.Description: JounceCycles Bit 07

Bit08.Description: JounceCycles Bit 08

Bit13.Description: JounceCycles Bit 13

Bit00.Description: JounceFrequency(Hz 100) Bit 00

Bit01.Description: JounceFrequency(Hz 100) Bit 01

Bit02.Description: JounceFrequency(Hz 100) Bit 02

Bit03.Description: JounceFrequency(Hz 100) Bit 03

Bit04.Description: JounceFrequency(Hz 100) Bit 04

Bit05.Description: JounceFrequency(Hz 100) Bit 05

Bit06.Description: JounceFrequency(Hz 100) Bit 06

Bit07.Description: JounceFrequency(Hz 100) Bit 07

Bit08.Description: JounceFrequency(Hz 100) Bit 08

Bit13.Description: JounceFrequency(Hz 100) Bit 13

Bit00.Description: RFWheelSpeed Bit 00

Bit01.Description: RFWheelSpeed Bit 01

Bit02.Description: RFWheelSpeed Bit 02

Bit03.Description: RFWheelSpeed Bit 03

Bit04.Description: RFWheelSpeed Bit 04

Bit05.Description: RFWheelSpeed Bit 05

Bit06.Description: RFWheelSpeed Bit 06

Bit07.Description: RFWheelSpeed Bit 07

Bit08.Description: RFWheelSpeed Bit 08

Bit13.Description: RFWheelSpeed Bit 13

Bit00.Description: RRWheelSpeed Bit 00

Bit01.Description: RRWheelSpeed Bit 01

Bit02.Description: RRWheelSpeed Bit 02

Bit03.Description: RRWheelSpeed Bit 03

Bit04.Description: RRWheelSpeed Bit 04

Bit05.Description: RRWheelSpeed Bit 05

Bit06.Description: RRWheelSpeed Bit 06

Bit07.Description: RRWheelSpeed Bit 07

Bit08.Description: RRWheelSpeed Bit 08

Bit13.Description: RRWheelSpeed Bit 13

Bit00.Description: UnableToCommunicateToWCC - Unable to communicate with the work cell controller. 1 - Fault, 0 - No Fault

Bit01.Description: WCCInternalFaults - Internal fault in the Work Cell Controller. 1 - Fault, 0 - No Fault

Bit02.Description: WCCToBroadcastCommunicationFault - The Work Cell Controller can not communicate with broadcast. 1 - Fault, 0 - No Fault

Bit03.Description: WCCFatalFault - Work Cell Controller fatal fault. 1 - Fatal Fault, 0 - No Fault

Bit04.Description: StackLightBlue - Turn on the blue stack light. 1 - On, 0 - Off

Bit05.Description: StackLightRed - Turn on the red stack light. 1 - On, 0 - Off

Bit06.Description: StackLightYellow - Turn on the yellow stack light. 1 - On, 0 - Off

Bit07.Description: StackLightGreen - Turn on the green stack light. 1 - On, 0 - Off

Bit08.Description: OpenN16_19_8 - Open

Bit13.Description: OpenN16_19_13 - Open

Bit00.Description: InterRollPressureHighWarning - The inter roller hydraulic pressure is high warning. 1 - Warning, 0 - No Warning

Bit01.Description: InterRollPressureHighShutdown - The inter roller hydraulic pressure has exceeded the maximum value. 1 - Fault, 0 - No Fault

Bit02.Description: Open_N16_20_2 - Open

Bit03.Description: Open_N16_20_3 - Open

Bit04.Description: Open_N16_20_4 - Open

Bit05.Description: Open_N16_20_5 - Open

Bit06.Description: Open_N16_20_6 - Open

Bit07.Description: Open_N16_20_7 - Open

Bit08.Description: Open_N16_20_8 - Open

Bit13.Description: Open_N16_20_13 - Open

Bit00.Description: StartCyclePushButton - Infrared pendant start cycle pushbutton. 1 - On, 0 - Off

Bit01.Description: AbortTestPushButtonToPLC - Infrared pendant abort test pushbutton. 1 - On, 0 - Off

Bit02.Description: ABSTestSelectedIRToPLC - Infrared pendant ABS test select pushbutton. 1 - On, 0 - Off

Bit03.Description: RetestPushButton - Infrared pendant retest pushbutton. 1 - On, 0 - Off

Bit04.Description: ElevatorsLoweredLight - Illuminate the elevators lowered light on the IR pendant. 1 - On, 0 - Off

Bit05.Description: ElevatorsRaisedLight - Illuminate the elevators raised light on the IR pendant. 1 - On, 0 - Off

Bit06.Description: OpenN16_21_6 - Open

Bit07.Description: LowerElevatorsPushbutton - Infrared pendant lower elevators pushbutton. 1 - On, 0 - Off

Bit08.Description: RaiseElevatorsPushbutton - Infrared pendant raise elevators pushbutton. 1 - On, 0 - Off

Bit13.Description: OpenN16_21_13 - Open

Bit00.Description: WheelbasePosition Bit 00

Bit01.Description: WheelbasePosition Bit 01

Bit02.Description: WheelbasePosition Bit 02

Bit03.Description: WheelbasePosition Bit 03

Bit04.Description: WheelbasePosition Bit 04

Bit05.Description: WheelbasePosition Bit 05

Bit06.Description: WheelbasePosition Bit 06

Bit07.Description: WheelbasePosition Bit 07

Bit08.Description: WheelbasePosition Bit 08

Bit13.Description: WheelbasePosition Bit 13

Bit00.Description: OverheadPosition Bit 00

Bit01.Description: OverheadPosition Bit 01

Bit02.Description: OverheadPosition Bit 02

Bit03.Description: OverheadPosition Bit 03

Bit04.Description: OverheadPosition Bit 04

Bit05.Description: OverheadPosition Bit 05

Bit06.Description: OverheadPosition Bit 06

Bit07.Description: OverheadPosition Bit 07

Bit08.Description: OverheadPosition Bit 08

Bit13.Description: OverheadPosition Bit 13

Bit00.Description: WheelBaseStartCommand - Start the wheelbase moving (pulse). 1 - Start Moving, 0 - Idle

Bit01.Description: OverheadStartCommand - Start the overhead monitor moving (pulse). 1 - Move, 0 - Idle

Bit02.Description: MoveDriverInterfacePanelIn - Move the drivers interface in so the driver can reach it. 1 - Move In, 0 - Idle

Bit03.Description: MoveDriverInterfacePanelOut - Move the drivers interface out so the driver leave the tester. 1 - Move Out, 0 - Idle

Bit04.Description: DriverInterfacePanelStartPulse - Move the drivers interface along the vehicle so the driver can reach it based on vehicle type. 1 - Move, 0 - Idle

Bit05.Description: ALDLTestRunning - The ALDL test is running, don?t start a test. 1 - Testing, 0 - Not Testing

Bit06.Description: OpenN16_24_6 - Open

Bit07.Description: OpenN16_24_7 - Open

Bit08.Description: OpenN16_24_8 - Open

Bit13.Description: OpenN16_24_13 - Open

Bit00.Description: VehiclePresentAtBarcodeDelayTime Bit 00

Bit01.Description: VehiclePresentAtBarcodeDelayTime Bit 01

Bit02.Description: VehiclePresentAtBarcodeDelayTime Bit 02

Bit03.Description: VehiclePresentAtBarcodeDelayTime Bit 03

Bit04.Description: VehiclePresentAtBarcodeDelayTime Bit 04

Bit05.Description: VehiclePresentAtBarcodeDelayTime Bit 05

Bit06.Description: VehiclePresentAtBarcodeDelayTime Bit 06

Bit07.Description: VehiclePresentAtBarcodeDelayTime Bit 07

Bit08.Description: VehiclePresentAtBarcodeDelayTime Bit 08

Bit13.Description: VehiclePresentAtBarcodeDelayTime Bit 13

Bit00.Description: BarCodeVerifyDelayTime Bit 00

Bit01.Description: BarCodeVerifyDelayTime Bit 01

Bit02.Description: BarCodeVerifyDelayTime Bit 02

Bit03.Description: BarCodeVerifyDelayTime Bit 03

Bit04.Description: BarCodeVerifyDelayTime Bit 04

Bit05.Description: BarCodeVerifyDelayTime Bit 05

Bit06.Description: BarCodeVerifyDelayTime Bit 06

Bit07.Description: BarCodeVerifyDelayTime Bit 07

Bit08.Description: BarCodeVerifyDelayTime Bit 08

Bit13.Description: BarCodeVerifyDelayTime Bit 13

Bit00.Description: RearWheelDriveFromPLC - Rear wheel drive signal. 1-RWD, 0-FWD

Bit01.Description: PowerSense - PLC power sense. 1-power on, 0-power off

Bit02.Description: StartTestFromPLC - Signal to start a test. 1-start test, 0 idle

Bit03.Description: ABSTestSelectedFromPLC - Indicate that the ABS test was selected. 1 - Testing ABS, 0 - Not Testing ABS

Bit04.Description: RollsDownElevUp - Rolls are down/elevater are up. 1-rolls down, elevators up, 0 - rolls up, elevators down

Bit05.Description: AllWheelDrive - All wheel drive mode.

Bit06.Description: TractionControlSelected - Traction control selected.

Bit07.Description: CruiseControlFromPLC - Cruise control test selected. 1-test selected, 0-not testing

Bit08.Description: FourWheelDrive - Four wheel drive test selected. 1-test selected, 0-no test

Bit09.Description: PositractionTest - Positraction test selected. 1-test selected, 0-not testing

Bit11.Description: AutomaticTransmissionFromPLC - Transmission test is automatic transmission. 1 - Automatic, 0 - Manual

Bit12.Description: ElectronicTransmissionSelected - Transmission test is electronic transmission.

Bit13.Description: TiltSteeringWheelTest - Steering wheel test selected. 1-test selected, 0-not testing

Bit14.Description: DriverPass - Driver indicated test pass. 1-test pass, 0-no result

Bit15.Description: DriverFail - Driver indicated test failed. 1-test failed, 0-no result

Bit00.Description: ParkingBrakeTestSelect - Select parking brake test. 1-parking brake test selected, 0-not testing

Bit01.Description: ParkingBrakeTestPass - Passed parking brake test.

Bit02.Description: ParkingBrakeTestFailed - Parking brake test failed. 1-test failed, 0-not tested

Bit03.Description: ClearPushbutton - Clear push button pressed. 1-pressed, 0-not pressed

Bit04.Description: StartSequencePushbutton - Start sequence push button pressed. 1-pressed, 0-not pressed

Bit05.Description: NextVINRequest - Next VIN being requested. 1-vin being requested, 0-not being requested

Bit06.Description: SpecificVINRequest - Specific VIN being requested. 1-vin being requested, 0-not being requested

Bit07.Description: ComputerModeSelected - Select computer mode. 1-selected, 0-not selected

Bit08.Description: JounceTestComplete - Jounce test has completed. 1-test completed, 0-not testing

Bit09.Description: OperatorPendOnDriverConsole - Operator pendant is on driver console. 1-on driver console, 2-not on console

Bit10.Description: InstVehiclePresent - Instantaneous vehicle present 1=vehicle present, 0=no vehicle present

Bit11.Description: LucasABSSelected - Lucas ABS test selected. 1-test selected, 0-not selected

Bit12.Description: DifferentialLockTestPB - Differential lock test push button depressed. 1-button depressed, 0-not depressed.

Bit13.Description: BoschABSSelected - Bosch ABS test selected. 1-test selected, 0-not testing

Bit14.Description: WheelbaseInPosition - Wheel base in position. 1-in position, 0-not in position

Bit15.Description: Check24VoltPowerSupply - Signal to PLC to instruct the VME to check the electric clutch +24 volt powersupply. 1 - check, 0 - idle

Bit00.Description: FrontRetainingRollsRaisedFault - Front retaining rolls raised fault.

Bit01.Description: RearRetainingRollsRaisedFault - Rear retaining rolls raised fault.

Bit02.Description: LeftStopPostRaisedFault - Left stop post raised fault.

Bit03.Description: RightStopPostRaisedFault - Right stop post raised fault.

Bit04.Description: FrontRetainingRollsLoweredFault - Front retaining rolls lowered fault.

Bit05.Description: RearRetainingRollsLoweredFault - Rear retaining rolls lowered fault.

Bit06.Description: LeftStopPostLoweredFault - Left stop post lowered fault.

Bit07.Description: RightStopPostLoweredFault - Right stop post lowered fault.

Bit08.Description: LubeSystemCycleSwitchFault - Lube system cycle switch fault.

Bit11.Description: SixtyGpmHydOutputFilterBlocked - 60 gpm hydraulic output filter blocked.

Bit12.Description: TwelveGpmHydOutputFilterBlocked - 12 gpm hydraulic output filter blocked.

Bit13.Description: HydraulicIntakeFilterBlocked - Hydraulic intake filter blocked.

Bit00.Description: WheelbaseMotorDriveFault - Wheelbase motor drive fault.

Bit01.Description: HydraulicMotorOverloadOpen - Hydraulic motor overload open.

Bit02.Description: WheelbaseMotorOverloadOpen - Wheelbase motor overload open.

Bit03.Description: SolenoidCircuitBreakerOpenPanel - Solenoid circuit breaker open panel.

Bit04.Description: LubeSystemLevelLowFault - Lube system level low fault.

Bit05.Description: LubeSystemPressureHighFault - Lube system pressure high fault.

Bit06.Description: SystemAirPressureLowFault - System air pressure low fault.

Bit07.Description: PLCSystemFailure - System failure asserted by the PLC-5/VME

Bit08.Description: PLCBatteryLowFault - The PLC battery voltage is low and needs to be replaced.

Bit09.Description: PLCRackFault - The PLC has a rack fault.

Bit10.Description: IntermediateRetainingRollsRaisedFault - Inter retaining rolls raised fault.

Bit11.Description: IntermediateRetainingRollsLoweredFault - Inter retaining rolls lowered fault.

Bit12.Description: WBPositionValueOutOfLimit - Wheelbase position value out of limits.

Bit13.Description: FifteenVoltDcPowerSupplyFault - 15 VDC power supply fault.

Bit15.Description: SolenoidFuseOpenPanel - Solenoid fuse open in the panel.

Bit00.Description: WheelbasePosition01Selected - Wheelbase Position 1 Selected. 1 - Selected, 0 - Not Selected

Bit01.Description: WheelbasePosition02Selected - Wheelbase Position 2 Selected. 1 - Selected, 0 - Not Selected

Bit02.Description: WheelbasePosition03Selected - Wheelbase Position 3 Selected. 1 - Selected, 0 - Not Selected

Bit03.Description: WheelbasePosition04Selected - Wheelbase Position 4 Selected. 1 - Selected, 0 - Not Selected

Bit04.Description: WheelbasePosition05Selected - Wheelbase Position 5 Selected. 1 - Selected, 0 - Not Selected

Bit05.Description: WheelbasePosition06Selected - Wheelbase Position 6 Selected. 1 - Selected, 0 - Not Selected

Bit06.Description: WheelbasePosition07Selected - Wheelbase Position 7 Selected. 1 - Selected, 0 - Not Selected

Bit07.Description: WheelbasePosition08Selected - Wheelbase Position 8 Selected. 1 - Selected, 0 - Not Selected

Bit08.Description: WheelbasePosition09Selected - Wheelbase Position 9 Selected. 1 - Selected, 0 - Not Selected

Bit09.Description: WheelbasePosition10Selected - Wheelbase Position 10 Selected. 1 - Selected, 0 - Not Selected

Bit10.Description: WheelbasePosition11Selected - Wheelbase Position 11 Selected. 1 - Selected, 0 - Not Selected

Bit11.Description: WheelbasePosition12Selected - Wheelbase Position 12 Selected. 1 - Selected, 0 - Not Selected

Bit12.Description: WheelbasePosition13Selected - Wheelbase Position 13 Selected. 1 - Selected, 0 - Not Selected

Bit13.Description: WheelbasePosition14Selected - Wheelbase Position 14 Selected. 1 - Selected, 0 - Not Selected

Bit14.Description: WheelbasePosition15Selected - Wheelbase Position 15 Selected. 1 - Selected, 0 - Not Selected

Bit15.Description: WheelbasePosition16Selected - Wheelbase Position 15 Selected. 1 - Selected, 0 - Not Selected

Bit00.Description: FrontEBSDriveOverloadOpenFault - Front EBS drive overload open fault.

Bit01.Description: RearEBSDriveOverloadOpenFault - Rear EBS drive overload open fault.

Bit02.Description: FrontEBSDriveNotRaisedFault - Front EBS drive not raised fault.

Bit03.Description: RearEBSDriveNotRaisedFault - Rear EBS drive not raised fault.

Bit04.Description: FrontEBSDriveNotLoweredFault - Front EBS drive not lowered fault.

Bit05.Description: RearEBSDriveNotLoweredFault - Rear EBS drive not lowered fault.

Bit06.Description: FrontEBSDriveDisconnectOpen - Front EBS drive disconnect open.

Bit07.Description: RearEBSDriveDisconnectOpen - Rear EBS drive disconnect open.

Bit08.Description: LRParkBrakeCylinderNotRetracted - Left rear parking brake cylinder not retracted.

Bit09.Description: RRParkBrakeCylinderNotRetracted - Right rear parking brake cylinder not retracted.

Bit10.Description: AirDoorNotRaisedFault - Air door not raised fault.

Bit11.Description: AirDoorNotLoweredFault - Air door not lowered fault.

Bit13.Description: PrimaryPhaseOrOpenBreaker - Primary phase or open braker.

Bit00.Description: FrontElevatorLoweredFault - Front elevator lowered fault.

Bit01.Description: FrontElevatorRaisedFault - Front elevator raised fault.

Bit02.Description: RearElevatorLoweredFault - Rear elevator lowered fault.

Bit03.Description: RearElevatorRaisedFault - Rear elevator raised fault.

Bit04.Description: RearStopPostRaisedFault - Rear stop post raised fault.

Bit05.Description: RearStopPostLoweredFault - Rear stop post lowered fault.

Bit06.Description: LeftJounceStabEngagedFault - Left jounce stabilizer engaged fault.

Bit07.Description: LeftJounceStabDisengagedFault - Left jounce stabilizer disengaged fault.

Bit08.Description: RightJounceStabEngagedFault - Right jounce stabilizer engaged fault.

Bit09.Description: RightJounceStabDisengagedFault - Right jounce stabilizer disengaged fault.

Bit13.Description: ParkingPawlCylFailToExtend - Parking pawl cylinder failed to extend.

Bit14.Description: ParkingPawlCylFailToRetract - Parking pawl cylinder failed to retract.

Bit15.Description: MonitorBoomNotRetractedFault - Monitor boom not retracted fault.

Bit00.Description: ParkingPawlTestPassed - Parking pawl test passed.

Bit01.Description: ParkingPawlTestFailed - Parking pawl test failed.

Bit02.Description: AbortSignalFromPLC - Abort signal received. 1-abort, 0-no abort signal

Bit03.Description: YesPB - Yes push button depressed. 1-button pressed, 0-not pressed

Bit04.Description: NoPB - No push button depressed. 1-button pressed, 0-not pressed

Bit05.Description: SideGuideContact - Side guide contact. 1-side guide contact, 0-no side guide contact

Bit06.Description: RollsUpElevDown - Retaining rolls are up. 1-retaining rolls up, 0-retaining rolls down

Bit07.Description: FrontEBSDriveOvercurrent - Front EBS drive overcurrent. 1-overcurrent, 0-not overcurrent

Bit08.Description: RearEBSDriveOvercurrent - Rear EBS drive overcurrent. 1-overcurrent, 0-not overcurrent

Bit09.Description: HydraulicSystemIdleTimeout - Hydraulic system idle timeout. 1-system timed out, 0-not timed out

Bit10.Description: KeylistSelectLSB - Keylist select least significant byte.

Bit12.Description: KeylistSelectMSB - Keylist select most significant byte.

Bit13.Description: SpeedDisplayScaling - Speed display scaling. 1-speed display scaling set, 0-not set

Bit14.Description: DaytimeRunningLightsSelectedFromPLC - Daytime running lights selected. 1-selected, 0-not selected

Bit00.Description: RollDriveMotorDisconnectOpen - Roll motor disconnect open. 1-open, 0-closed

Bit01.Description: RollDriveMotorOverloadOpen - Roll drive motor overload open. 1-open, 0-closed

Bit02.Description: HydraulicOilCircPumpDiscOpen - Hydraulic oil circuit pump disconnect open. 1-open, 0-closed

Bit03.Description: HydraulicOilCircPumpOverloadOpen - Hydraulic oil circuit pump overload open. 1-open, 0-closed

Bit04.Description: HydraulicOilHeatExFanDiscOpen - Hydraulic oil heat exchange fan disconnect open. 1-open, 0-closed

Bit05.Description: HydraulicOilHeatExFanOverloadOpen - Hydraulic oil heat exchange fan overload open. 1-open, 0-closed

Bit06.Description: ControlPowerCircuitBreakerOpen - Control power circuit breaker open. 1-open, 0-closed

Bit07.Description: PrimaryVACCircuitBreakerOpen - Primary VAC circuit breaker open. 1-open, 0-closed

Bit08.Description: RetainingRollLockEngagedFault - Retaining roll lock engaged fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit09.Description: RetainingRollLockDisengagedFault - Retaining roll lock disengaged fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit10.Description: LeftStoneGuardExtendedFault - Left stone guard extended fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit11.Description: LeftStoneGuardRetractedFault - Left stone guard retracted fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit12.Description: RightStoneGuardExtendedFault - Right stone guard extended fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit13.Description: RightStoneGuardRetractedFault - Right stone guard retracted fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit14.Description: FrontHydraulicClutchEngagedFault - Front hydraulic clutch engaged fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit15.Description: RearHydraulicClutchEngagedFault - Rear hydraulic clutch engaged fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit00.Description: SolenoidCircuitBreakerOpenJBox - Solenoid circuit breaker open J-Box. 1-open, 0-not open

Bit01.Description: SolenoidFuseOpenJBox - Solenoid fuse open J-Box. 1-open, 0-not open

Bit02.Description: FrontEBSMotorDriveFault - Front EBS motor drive fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit03.Description: RearEBSMotorDriveFault - Rear EBS motor drive fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit04.Description: HolddownPlatformRaisedFault - Hold down platform raised fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit05.Description: HolddownPlatformLoweredFault - Hold down platform lowered fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit06.Description: HolddownPlatformLockEngagedFault - Hold down platform lock engaged fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit07.Description: HolddownPlatformLockDisengagedFault - Hold down platform lock disengaged fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit08.Description: PitVentilationInterlockFault - Pit ventilation interlock fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit10.Description: HydraulicCirculationMotorOvercurrent - Hydraulic circuit motor overcurrent. 1-overcurrent, 0-not overcurrent

Bit11.Description: HydraulicOilCoolingFanOvercurrent - Hydraulic oil cooling fan overcurrent. 1-overcurrent, 0-not overcurrent

Bit12.Description: WheelbaseMotorOvercurrent - Wheel base motor overcurrent. 1-overcurrent, 0-not overcurrent

Bit13.Description: StopPostSafetyPinsNotRemoved - Stop post safety pins no removed. 1-no removed, 0-removed

Bit14.Description: FrontHydraulicClutchDisengagedFault - Front Hydraulic clutch disengaged fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit15.Description: RearHydraulicClutchDisengagedFault - Rear hydraulic clutch disengaged fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit00.Description: AllFlyWheelsAtZerospeed - All flywheels at zerospeed. 1-at zerospeed, 0-not at zerospeed

Bit01.Description: RighthandDriveSelectedFromPLC - Right hand drive selected. 1-selected, 0-not selected

Bit02.Description: FrontFlywheelsEngaged - Front flywheels engaged. 1-engaged, 0-not engaged

Bit03.Description: RearFlywheelsEngaged - Rear flywheels engaged. 1-engaged, 0-not engaged

Bit04.Description: KelseyHayesRwalTestSelected - Kelsey Hayes Rwal test selected. 1-selected, 0-not selected

Bit05.Description: KelseyHayes4WALTestSelected - The Kelsey Hayes four wheel ABS test is selected. 1 - selected, 0 - not selected

Bit06.Description: VehicleAtBarcodeScanner - Vehicle is at barcode scanner. 1-vehicle at scanner, 0-not at scanner

Bit07.Description: NoABSSelected - Select no ABS test. 1-selected, 0-not selected

Bit08.Description: TevesABSSelected - Teves ABS brake test selected. 1-test selected, 0-not selected

Bit09.Description: WheelbaseJogMode - Wheel base job mode. 1-jog mode

Bit10.Description: StartDynoTest - Start dyno test. 1-start test, 0-no test

Bit11.Description: PrintTestResults - Print test results. 1-print results, 0-don?t print results

Bit13.Description: Start40KPHTest - Start the 40 KPH test. 1 - start, 0 - not started

Bit14.Description: Start50MPHTest - Start the 50 MPH test. 1 - start, 0 - not started

Bit15.Description: FreePassPB - Free pass PB. 1-button pressed, 0-not pressed

Bit00.Description: VehicleType bit 00

Bit01.Description: VehicleType bit 01

Bit02.Description: VehicleType bit 02

Bit03.Description: VehicleType bit 03

Bit04.Description: VehicleType bit 04

Bit05.Description: VehicleType bit 05

Bit06.Description: VehicleType bit 06

Bit07.Description: VehicleType bit 07

Bit08.Description: VehicleType bit 08

Bit13.Description: VehicleType bit 13

Bit00.Description: FrontEBSMotorOvercurrent - Front EBS motor overcurrent. 1-overcurrent, 0-no overcurrent

Bit01.Description: RearEBSMotorOvercurrent - Rear EBS motor overcurrent. 1-overcurrent, 0-no overcurrent

Bit02.Description: LubeLevelLowShutdownFault - Lube level low shutdown fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit03.Description: LubePressureHighShutdownFault - Lube pressure high shutdown fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit04.Description: MotorBlowerFuseOpenJBox - Motor blower fuse open J-box. 1-fuse open, 0-not open

Bit05.Description: PowerSupplyFault24Volt - Wheelbase 24V power supply fault. 1 - fault, 0 - no fault

Bit06.Description: LeftRearParkBrakeCylinderFailedToExtend - Left rear park brake cylinder failed to extend. 1-failed, 0-not failed

Bit07.Description: RightRearParkBrakeCylinderFailedToExtend - Right rear park brake cylinder failed to extend. 1-failed extend, 0-ok

Bit08.Description: DCHoldingBrakeDisabled - DC holding brake disabled. 1-disabled, 0-not disabled

Bit09.Description: MonitorBoomNotExtendedFault - Monitor boom not extended fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit10.Description: FrontInterRollClutchEngageFault - Front inter roll clutch engage fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit11.Description: RearInterRollClutchEngageFault - Rear inter roll clutch engage fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit12.Description: FrontInterRollClutchDisengageFault - Front inter roll clutch disengage fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit13.Description: RearInterRollClutchDisengageFault - Rear inter roll clutch disengage fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit14.Description: BrakeTestPushbutton - Brake test push button. 1-button pressed, 0-not pressed

Bit15.Description: ReflectedVmeHeartBeat - Reflected VME heart beat. (WARNING, IN DC THIS IS STOP POST BLOCKED FAULT and is refered to as StopPostBlockedFault in the fault table)

Bit00.Description: LeftFrontRollMotorDisconnectOpen - Left front roll motor disconnect open. 1-open, 0-not open

Bit01.Description: RightFrontRollMotorDisconnectOpen - Right front roll motor disconnect open. 1-open, 0-not open

Bit02.Description: LeftRearRollMotorDisconnectOpen - Left rear roll motor disconect open. 1-open, 0-not open

Bit03.Description: RightRearRollMotorDisconnectOpen - Right rear roll motor disconnect open. 1-open, 0-not open

Bit04.Description: LeftFrontRollMotorOverloadOpen - Left front roll motor overload open. 1-open, 0-not open

Bit05.Description: RightFrontRollMotorOverloadOpen - Right front roll motor overload open. 1-open, 0-not open

Bit06.Description: LeftRearRollMotorOverloadOpen - Left rear roll motor overload open. 1-open, 0-not open

Bit07.Description: RightRearRollMotorOverloadOpen - Right rear roll motor overload open. 1-open, 0-not open

Bit08.Description: LeftFrontRollMotorDriveFault - Left front roll motor drive fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit09.Description: RightFrontRollMotorDriveFault - Right front roll motor drive fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit10.Description: LeftRearRollMotorDriveFault - Left rear roll motor drive fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit11.Description: RightRearRollMotorDriveFault - Right rear roll motor drive fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit13.Description: MotorTaskHearbeatFault - Motor task heartbeat fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit14.Description: OperatorCrtDriveFault - Operator CRT drive fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit15.Description: OperatorCrtPositioningFault - Operator CRT positioning fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit00.Description: PLC5Rack0Fault - PLC-5 Rack 0 Fault. 1 - fault detected, 0 - no fault

Bit01.Description: PLC5Rack1Fault - PLC-5 Rack 1 Fault. 1 - fault detected, 0 - no fault

Bit02.Description: PLC5Rack2Fault - PLC-5 Rack 2 Fault. 1 - fault detected, 0 - no fault

Bit03.Description: PLC5Rack3Fault - PLC-5 Rack 3 Fault. 1 - fault detected, 0 - no fault

Bit04.Description: PLC5Rack4Fault - PLC-5 Rack 4 Fault. 1 - fault detected, 0 - no fault

Bit05.Description: PLC5Rack5Fault - PLC-5 Rack 5 Fault. 1 - fault detected, 0 - no fault

Bit06.Description: PLC5Rack6Fault - PLC-5 Rack 6 Fault. 1 - fault detected, 0 - no fault

Bit07.Description: PLC5Rack7Fault - PLC-5 Rack 7 Fault. 1 - fault detected, 0 - no fault

Bit08.Description: FireAlarm - Fire alarm. 1-alarm, 0-no alarm

Bit09.Description: ExhaustExtractSystemFault - Exaust extract system fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit11.Description: EntranceDoorFault - Set when the entrance door has faulted. 1 = fault, 0 = Ok

Bit12.Description: LeftFrontRollMotorOvercurrent - Left front roll motor overcurrent. 1-overcurrent, 0-not overcurrent

Bit13.Description: RightFrontRollMotorOvercurrent - Right front roll motor overcurrent. 1-overcurrent, 0-not overcurrent

Bit14.Description: LeftRearRollMotorOvercurrent - Left rear roll motor overcurrent. 1-overcurrent, 0-not overcurrent

Bit15.Description: RightRearRollMotorOvercurrent - Right rear roll motor overcurrent. 1-overcurrent, 0-not overcurrent

Bit00.Description: NissinboABSSelected - Nissinbo ABS selected. 1-selected, 0-not selected.

Bit01.Description: OpenN17_15_1 - Open

Bit02.Description: OpenN17_15_2 - Open

Bit03.Description: OpenN17_15_3 - Open

Bit04.Description: OpenN17_15_4 - Open

Bit05.Description: OpenN17_15_5 - Open

Bit06.Description: OpenN17_15_6 - Open

Bit07.Description: OpenN17_15_7 - Open

Bit08.Description: OpenN17_15_8 - Open

Bit13.Description: OpenN17_15_13 - Open

Bit00.Description: VehiclePushersExtendedFault - Vehicle pushers extended fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit01.Description: VehiclePushersRetractedFault - Vehicle pushers retracted fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit02.Description: DripPanFullFault - Drip pan full fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit03.Description: LaserGuardFault - Laser guard fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit04.Description: OverheadMotorDriveFault - Overhead motor drive fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit05.Description: OverheadPositionFileFault - Overhead positioning fault commanded position invalid (not in file). 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit06.Description: OverheadPositioningFault - Overhead positioning fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit07.Description: Panel2HighTempWarning - Overtemperature condition detected in panel #2. 1 - fault, 0 - no fault

Bit08.Description: LeftTandemRollMotorDriveFault - Left tandem roll motor drive.

Bit09.Description: RightTandemRollMotorDriveFault - Right tandem roll motor drive fault.

Bit10.Description: LeftTandemRollMotorDisconnectOpen - Left tandem roll motor disconnect drive.

Bit11.Description: RightTandemRollMotorDiscOpen - Right intermediate roll motor disconnect open. 1-open, 0-not open

Bit12.Description: MonitorStopNotRetracting - Monitor stop not retracting. 1-no retracting, 0-retracting

Bit13.Description: DriverInterfaceExtendedFault - Driver interface extended fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit14.Description: DriverInterfaceRetractedFault - Driver interface retracted fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit15.Description: ExhaustCarriageDriveFault - Exhause carriage drive fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit00.Description: PLCAuxilliaryOutputOneIsOn - PLC auxilliary output one is on. 1-on, 0-off

Bit01.Description: PLCAuxilliaryOutputTwoIsOn - PLC auxilliary output two is on. 1-on, 0-off

Bit02.Description: PLCSystemIsReady - PLC system is ready. 1-system is ready, 0-not ready

Bit03.Description: BarcodeModeSelected - Barcode mode selected. 1-selected, 0-not selected.

Bit04.Description: KeypadModeSelected - Keypad mode selected. 1-selected, 0-not selected.

Bit05.Description: ModelYearSwitch - Model year switch. 1-switch, 0-no switch

Bit06.Description: OverheadInPosition - Overhead in position. 1-in position, 0-not in position

Bit07.Description: DriverInterfacePanelExtended - Driver interface panel extended. 1-extended, 0-not extended

Bit08.Description: DriverInterfacePanelRetracted - Driver interface panel retracted. 1-retracted, 0-not retracted

Bit10.Description: RegenDrivePowerTimerActive - Regen drive power timer active. 1-active, 0-not active

Bit11.Description: RollMotorPowerSupplyDBOn - Roll motor power supply DB on. 1-db on, 0-not on

Bit12.Description: RollMotorPowerSupplyReady - Roll motor power supply ready. 1-ready, 0-not ready

Bit13.Description: TorqueOkFromTorqueController - Indicates that torque was within range from the torque controller

Bit14.Description: LeftSideGuideContacted - Left side guide contacted. 1-guide contacted, 0-not contacted

Bit15.Description: RightSideGuideContacted - Right side guide contacted. 1-guide contacted, 0-not contacted

Bit00.Description: CurrentWBPosition bit 00

Bit01.Description: CurrentWBPosition bit 01

Bit02.Description: CurrentWBPosition bit 02

Bit03.Description: CurrentWBPosition bit 03

Bit04.Description: CurrentWBPosition bit 04

Bit05.Description: CurrentWBPosition bit 05

Bit06.Description: CurrentWBPosition bit 06

Bit07.Description: CurrentWBPosition bit 07

Bit08.Description: CurrentWBPosition bit 08

Bit13.Description: CurrentWBPosition bit 13

Bit00.Description: CurrentOHPosition bit 00

Bit01.Description: CurrentOHPosition bit 01

Bit02.Description: CurrentOHPosition bit 02

Bit03.Description: CurrentOHPosition bit 03

Bit04.Description: CurrentOHPosition bit 04

Bit05.Description: CurrentOHPosition bit 05

Bit06.Description: CurrentOHPosition bit 06

Bit07.Description: CurrentOHPosition bit 07

Bit08.Description: CurrentOHPosition bit 08

Bit13.Description: CurrentOHPosition bit 13

Bit00.Description: PanelEStopPushbuttonDepressed - Panel e-stop push button depressed. 1-pressed, 0-not pressed

Bit01.Description: RightFrontMachineEStopPBDepressed - Right front machine e-stop push button depressed. 1-pressed, 0-not pressed

Bit02.Description: LeftRearMachineEStopPBDepressed - Left rear machine e-stop push button depressed. 1-pressed, 0-not pressed

Bit03.Description: StopPBDepressedLHPendant - The left hand operator pendant E-Stop depressed. 1 - pressed, 0 - not pressed

Bit04.Description: StopPBDepressedRHPendant - The right hand operator pendant E-Stop depressed. 1 - pressed, 0 - not pressed

Bit05.Description: AirDoorStopPinProx1Activated - Air Door Stop Pin is in location 1.

Bit06.Description: AirDoorStopPinProx2Activated - Air Door Stop Pin insterted in location 2.

Bit07.Description: LFStopPostPinInserted - The status of the left front stop post pin. 1 - inserted, 0 - not inserted

Bit08.Description: RFStopPostPinInserted - The status of the right front stop post pin. 1 - inserted, 0 - not inserted

Bit09.Description: ExhaustStopPinProx1Activated - Stop pin in the exhaust door in location 1.

Bit10.Description: ExhaustStopPinProx2Activated - Stop pin in the exhaust door in location 2.

Bit11.Description: RollMotorPowerSupplyFaulted - Roll motor power supply alarm fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit12.Description: RollMotorPowerSupplyAlarmOn - Roll motor power supply alarm on. 1-alarm on, 0-alarm off

Bit13.Description: MonitorLowerFault - Monitor lowered fault (Coud Not Extend The Monitor DCX). 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit14.Description: MonitorRaiseFault - Monitor raised fault (Coud Not Retract The Monitor DCX). 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit00.Description: LeftFrontRollMotorContactorFault - Left front roll motor contactor fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit01.Description: RightFrontRollMotorContactorFault - Right front roll motor contactor fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit02.Description: LeftRearRollMotorContactorFault - Left rear roll motor contactor fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit03.Description: RightRearRollMotorContactorFault - Right rear roll motor contactor fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit04.Description: VentilationSupplyFlowFault - Ventilation supply flow fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit05.Description: VentilationExhaustFlowFault - Ventilation exhaust flow fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit06.Description: VentilationSupplyMotorDisconnectFault - Ventilation supply motor disconnect fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault.

Bit07.Description: VentilationExhaustMotorDisconnectFault - Ventilation exhaust motor disconnect fault. 1-fault, 0-no fault

Bit08.Description: OpenN17_21_8 - Open

Bit13.Description: OpenN17_21_13 - Open

Bit00.Description: AirbagTestOnly - Airbag test only. 1-airbag test only, 0-no test

Bit01.Description: AirbagInLockBox - Airbag in lock box. 1-in lock box, 0-not in lock box

Bit02.Description: LockBoxDoorClosed - Lock box door closed. 1-door closed, 0-not closed

Bit03.Description: SteeringWheelToolInPlace - Steering wheel tool in place. 1-in place, 0-not in place

Bit04.Description: AllRollDrivesEnabled - All roll drives enabled. 1-enabled, 0-not enabled

Bit05.Description: OpenN17_22_5 - Open

Bit06.Description: OpenN17_22_6 - Open

Bit07.Description: OpenN17_22_7 - Open

Bit08.Description: OpenN17_22_8 - Open

Bit13.Description: OpenN17_22_13 - Open
